notes: Per-bet records of last 250 resolved bets (filtered to YES/NO resolution + non-null my_estimate).
horizon_days_at_bet derived from earliest entry in bet_history.jsonl matching market_id; coverage incomplete for older bets.
Retracts c2680 file's claim that per-bet export was blocked — the data was available in state/manifold.json:resolved_bets_log all along.
